title: Steel
description: This mod adds a mid-game to end-game material that is 3x as strong as iron and rivals diamond. Steel can be crafted into armor and various tools. If you like steel and tetanus, you might like this.
body:
# Steel Mod

This mod adds **steel**, a mid- to end-game material that’s **three times stronger than iron** and **rivals diamond**. You can craft **tools, armor**, and more with steel. 

### Features:
- **Steel** is crafted from iron and other materials.
- Stronger than iron, almost as strong as diamond.
- Includes tools, armor, and various craftable items.
  
### Known Issues:
- **REI** shows the wrong recipe. It says to use a smoker instead of a **blast furnace** to make steel. Don’t ask me why, just... don’t. We all know it's a mistake, but it works! Sort of.

### Bonus:
If you like **steel** and enjoy **tetanus**, you might just love this mod. **(Handle with care.)**
